about:
Falcon View by JLPL (Janta Land Promoters) is a landmark luxury residential address in Sector 66-A, Mohali, set across approximately 34.02 acres at the heart of the Tricity. Designed by world-renowned architect Hafeez Contractor, the project is announced by an iconic falcon-shaped grand entrance — a symbol of strength and freedom — that leads into a community defined by grand architecture and meticulous landscaping.

Known as the green jewel of Tricity, Falcon View devotes 18 acres to lush green landscape, with vehicle-free green walkways and gardens designed to bring residents closer to nature. At its centre sits one of India's biggest clubhouses, spread over 1,50,000 sq ft, with a double-height lobby and an exhaustive suite of indoor and outdoor amenities — from an Olympic-size pool and a 9-hole mini golf arena to squash and badminton courts, a spa, banquet hall and fine-dine restaurant.

The residences range from spacious 3 and 4 BHK apartments to expansive duplex penthouses, each thoughtfully planned with utility/servant accommodation, full-height windows, dry and wet kitchens and 5-star double-height tower lobbies. Strategically positioned minutes from the International Airport, Knowledge City and GMADA IT City, Falcon View pairs premium living with exceptional connectivity.

about:
Galaxy Heights-2 is JLPL's latest high-rise residential address in the coveted Sector 66-A of Mohali, rising adjacent to its predecessor Galaxy Heights and the Sky Gardens community. Designed by internationally renowned architect Hafeez Contractor, it brings together world-class aesthetics, considered specifications and a sense of understated, new-age luxury. Four majestic towers hold 284 thoughtfully planned 2 and 3 BHK apartments, each oriented to capture the best possible views, with ample windows and wide-spread balconies that lend every home a feeling of openness, light and fresh air.

Life here is built around comfort and community. Approximately 40,000 sq.ft. of beautifully landscaped greens wrap the towers, leading to a roughly 5,500 sq.ft. club house with an outdoor swimming pool, gymnasium, spa, reading room and indoor games. Outdoor spaces are equally generous, with an amphitheater, grand lawn, kids' play areas, a box-cricket pitch, an outdoor gym and a multipurpose court. The homes themselves are warm and welcoming - elegant kitchens designed for both beauty and function, cosy bedrooms and inviting living areas finished in quality materials.

Developed by Janta Land Promoters, one of Punjab's pioneering real estate master developers with a track record that includes Falcon View, Sky Gardens and a delivered mega-township of over 400 acres, Galaxy Heights-2 sits within a fully integrated, gated environment backed by 24-hour security, rain water harvesting, solar provisions and dependable power backup. It is an exclusive, luxuriously elegant living space designed to let your happiness ascend to the pinnacle.
locationAdv: Located in Sector 66-A, part of JLPL's Super Mega Mixed-Use Integrated Industrial Park spread across Sectors 66-A, 82 and 83, Mohali
Within JLPL's integrated green destination featuring IT towers, malls, multiplexes, business centres, hotels and healthcare facilities
Adjacent to Galaxy Heights and Sky Gardens residential communities
Set along a 100-foot-wide road for easy connectivity

about:
Noble Callista is an uber-luxury residential address by Noble Ventures, rising at Plot No. 1, Sector 66 Beta within IT City, Mohali. Conceived as a low-density sanctuary at around 55 families per acre, the gated community pairs 18-storied towers built with Mivan brick-less construction technology against 3.5 acres of landscaped parkland, water features and tree-lined walking and cycling tracks.

The residences are spacious 3+1, 4+1 and 5+1 BHK bespoke apartments, each finished with marbled flooring, premium modular kitchens, all-weather hybrid air-conditioning and signature windows that flood the homes with natural light. With only two to four apartments per floor, every home enjoys cross-ventilation, a central-green or hill outlook and a genuine sense of privé living. Each unit also accommodates servant, pooja and store rooms for effortless day-to-day living.

What sets Noble Callista apart is its leisure offering: the first project in the region to feature five club houses, anchored by the Master Club 'Club Royce'. Residents enjoy a half-Olympic swimming pool with a dedicated women's section, a fully-equipped gymnasium, indoor and outdoor sports courts, a spa, a mini cineplex and curated green zones for every age. The Maha-Vastu compliant masterplan, three car parks per home and a 9,000 sq.ft. shopping arcade complete an address designed for effortless 24x7 living.

about:
JLPL Galaxy Heights is a multi-storey freehold residential development that rises in the heart of Sector 66A, Mohali. Spread across 4.12 acres of lush green surroundings, the project brings together six aesthetically designed residential towers, offering world-class 2 BHK apartments crafted for comfortable, contemporary living. Designed by internationally renowned architect Hafeez Contractor, the towers balance privacy, generous space utilisation and resort-style amenities.

Residents enjoy over 40,000 sq.ft. of beautifully landscaped greens, an approximately 6,000 sq.ft. Club House with a swimming pool, and a gated community secured by 24-hour manned perimeter security and electronic surveillance. Earthquake-resistant RCC construction, modular kitchens, rain water harvesting and reliable power backup combine to deliver dependable, urban-ready homes.

Developed by Janta Land Promoters Ltd. (JLPL), an integrated real estate master developer with a proven track record across Mohali and Punjab, Galaxy Heights enjoys a prime, well-connected address - close to the upcoming Chandigarh-Mohali International Airport, Infosys Mohali, the Mohali Railway Station and the Knowledge City institutional belt. It is luxury made affordable, in one of Mohali's most coveted growth corridors.

about:
Hero Homes Mohali, set in Sector 88, is the Phase III chapter of Hero Realty's flagship residential brand — an iconic development where contemporary living blends seamlessly with the serenity of nature. Conceived around the idea of the Parkside Life, the project offers spacious 4 BHK residences framed by lush green landscapes, more than 85% open spaces and uninterrupted views of the Shivalik Hills from every balcony.

The two new towers introduce 172 elevated homes, each 3,490 sq.ft., defined by marble flooring, six-foot-wide balconies, smart door locks, DGU doors and windows, and a modular kitchen with hob and chimney. Residents arrive through a majestic tower entrance into a grand double-height lobby, and enjoy an exclusive 28,934 sq.ft. recreation zone alongside a sprawling 22,500 sq.ft. clubhouse.

Backed by the seven-decade legacy of Hero Enterprise and built to an IGBC Gold standard on a climate-responsive, Vastu-aligned master plan, the community pairs wellness-focused amenities — yoga terrace, business center, senior citizen e-library lounge and abundant sport and play facilities — with strong connectivity to Chandigarh, its airport and the city's key institutions. The result is a rare balance of modern convenience and natural grandeur.

about:
Horizon Belmond is The Horizon Group's flagship luxury residential address in the prime Sector 88 of Mohali, set on the GH2, Sector 88-89 dividing road. Conceived as an ode to the glory of Punjab, the precinct rises as seven exclusive Belmond Towers, each a striking G+24 storey high-rise designed to redefine the city's skyline. With only a cluster of two apartments on every floor, every home is both-side open and green-facing, drenched in natural light and ventilation, and complemented by generous sun decks and uninterrupted views.

At the heart of the offering sits the Koh-i-Noor collection, a limited edition of 5 BHK exclusive duplex residences appointed with personal lifts, double-height living rooms, large sun decks and sophisticated, curated finishes. The interiors carry the signature of acclaimed designer Sussanne Khan, while project execution is overseen by Colliers International, lending the development a rare pedigree of craftsmanship and precision.

Life at Horizon Belmond revolves around Club Stardom, an exclusive indoor club housing an all-weather pool, a fully equipped gymnasium, a library, banquet hall, restaurant and coffee shop, alongside open-air sports courts and lush landscaped greens. A Vastu-compliant plan and sustainable systems such as rainwater harvesting and a sewage treatment plant round out a community designed for elevated, balanced and enduring living.
locationAdv: Located in the prime Sector 88 of Mohali, Punjab's future city

about:
Joy Grand is a premium high-rise residential address by Joy Group, rising in SAS Nagar, Mohali, within the heart of the Tricity. Conceived around the idea of a glorious family legacy, the development offers thoughtfully planned 3 BHK + 1 and 4 BHK + 1 corner residences designed for those who value space, light and refinement in equal measure.

The architecture lets elegance blend with modernity. Sweeping balconies, generous living and dining rooms, serene bedrooms and private elevators come together to create an effortless, contemporary lifestyle. Interiors are finished with premium Italian marble, laminated wooden flooring, modular kitchens and quality fittings, while every detail honours timeless elegance alongside the comforts of the future.

Set within a landscaped, gated community, Joy Grand pairs lush central greens, a swimming pool, recreation lounges and a clubhouse with the connectivity advantages of Mohali. It is positioned as a luxury home crafted for a premier legacy, for families who want their address to tell their story for generations to come.

Convenient access to Chandigarh and Mohali International Airport

about:
The Medallion by Turnstone Realty is a luxury residential address in IT City, Sector 82 Alpha, on Mohali's 200-ft Airport Road. Conceived around the spirit of the Zen Enso, a symbol of strength, elegance and one-mindedness, the development pairs vibrant community living with carefully composed green spaces, including a central green and concept gardens for flowers, herbs, Zen and therapy.

The residences are offered as 3 BHK Mini, 3 BHK + Store and 4 BHK apartments ranging from 1,550 to 2,695 sq.ft of super area. Independent towers rise 22 storeys in an earthquake-resistant Mivan RCC framework, with every flat a corner flat designed for ample sunlight and cross ventilation. Thoughtful touches such as double-height podium parking, a Tri-City first, dedicated tower lobbies with drop-off points and a Vastu-compliant site reflect the developer's customer-centric ethos.

A resort-style amenity programme spans a swimming pool, spa and sauna, gymnasium, terrace lounge, indoor games arcade, co-working spaces and a full suite of sports courts, alongside dedicated zones for children and senior residents. Set minutes from the international airport, the Indian School of Business, Infosys and leading universities, The Medallion places an immaculate living experience at the heart of the city's most thriving neighbourhood.

about:
Vintage Greens by Vintage Buildtech rises as a landmark of timeless architecture and modern living along the International Airport Road in Zirakpur. The sculpted high-rise towers, framed by lush greens and curving landscapes, blend nature, elegance and functionality into a community where every residence reflects thoughtful planning.

The project offers spacious 3 BHK, 3 BHK+1 and 4 BHK+1 apartments from 2350 to 3796 sq.ft, each balancing privacy, comfort and community. Wide corridors, dedicated utility and servant provisions and generous balconies bring an effortless flow, while the grand clubhouse anchors the social heart.

Residents enjoy a curated suite of amenities — pool, gym, mini theatre, tennis and basketball courts, banquet hall, library, pet park and kids' play areas — all secured by a five-tier system. Minutes from the airport and the wider Tricity, Vintage Greens pairs serene green surroundings with seamless urban connectivity.

name: Opus One
tagline: The tallest residential address in New Chandigarh
highlights: The tallest residential development in New Chandigarh
688 exclusive residences across 9 unit plans
7-tier security
IGBC Platinum pre-certified & Punjab Govt 'Iconic' certified
Architecture by Aréte Design Studio; landscape by TROP (Bangkok)
Interiors by Chris Godfrey (Singapore); lighting by LDP (Australia)
about:
Opus One by GB Realty is a hyper-luxury residential landmark in ECO City, New Chandigarh — the tallest residential development in the region. Spanning 688 exclusive residences across nine carefully composed unit plans, it brings together a global design pedigree: architecture by Aréte Design Studio, landscape by TROP of Bangkok, interiors by Chris Godfrey of Singapore and lighting by LDP of Australia.

IGBC Platinum pre-certified and certified 'Iconic' by the Punjab Government, Opus One pairs 3, 4 and 5 BHK homes with a seven-tier security system and resort-grade amenities. It is an address designed for those who want their home to be a statement as much as a sanctuary.

name: La Parisian
tagline: A Parisian dream in New Chandigarh
highlights: French Paris-inspired architecture with green-domed G+15 towers
An Eiffel Tower replica at the heart of the central greens
3 BHK (Triomphe) & 4 BHK (Versailles) luxury residences
Grand European-style clubhouse and landscaped gardens
RERA-registered across Phase I & II
Set in fast-growing Sector 88-B, New Chandigarh
about:
La Parisian by the Ambika Group brings a slice of Paris to New Chandigarh. Its green-domed, European-styled towers rise around landscaped central greens crowned by an Eiffel Tower replica, creating one of the region's most distinctive residential addresses.

The development offers 3 BHK homes in the Triomphe towers and expansive 4 BHK residences in the Versailles tower, paired with a grand clubhouse and curated gardens. RERA-registered across two phases, La Parisian is designed for those who want their everyday to feel like a getaway.

RERA-registered (PBRERA-SAS81-PR1009)
about: Wave Estate — Group Housing-2 (Phase 2) is a residential development within the established Wave Estate township in Mohali. It offers a range of homes spanning 2, 3 and 4 BHK apartments alongside duplexes and penthouses, registered under Punjab RERA (PBRERA-SAS81-PR1009).

name: Noble Magnollia
tagline: Luxury 3 & 4 BHK residences in the heart of Mohali
highlights: Spacious 3 & 4 BHK residences, each with a dedicated family lounge
Gated community of multiple high-rise towers
Central landscaped greens with water features and trails

Vaastu-aligned unit layouts

By ACPL, with design credentials across India and Dubai
about:
Noble Magnollia is a premium residential address in Sector 88, Mohali, by ACPL — a developer with a footprint across India and Dubai. Set within a master-planned gated community, the towers are arranged around a sweeping central landscape of manicured greens, reflective water bodies and walking trails, creating a calm, resort-like setting at the heart of the Tricity.

The development offers expansive 3 and 4 BHK residences, each with a dedicated family lounge and generous balconies that draw in light and greenery. Every home is Vaastu-planned with a puja niche, servant quarters and well-considered utility spaces. Beyond the apartments, residents enjoy an on-site club and retail arcade, sports courts, play zones and abundant open landscape.
locationAdv: Sector 88, a prime Mohali residential corridor
Frontage on main arterial roads
Well connected to Chandigarh and the Tricity

about:
Noble Aurellia is a collection of exclusive high-rise residences conceived as a resort-style retreat in the heart of Sector 88, Mohali. Developed by Noble Ventures with CRA Buildtech, four stylish towers front a landscaped urban park, offering a stunning panorama of the Central Aquatic Green. Breaking from the conventional linear layout, the towers are curved and angled away from one another to maximise open space, frame uninterrupted views and heighten privacy.

Homes are offered as expansive 3 BHK and 3 BHK with servant configurations, scaling up to duplex penthouses, with super areas from 2,651 to 5,782 sq.ft. Interiors are finished in a warm, quiet-luxury palette of marble, fluted woodwork and layered lighting, while wide balconies extend the living spaces toward the greens.

Residents enjoy resort-style amenities anchored by a sculptural clubhouse, a pool with sun deck, water channels, sports courts and landscaped gathering spaces, with an on-site retail high street. Positioned on a main arterial road with direct access to the Tricity, Noble Aurellia pairs an elevated lifestyle with everyday convenience.
locationAdv: Sector 88 with main-road frontage and excellent connectivity
Close to Aerocity, IT City and the Mohali grid
Convenient access to Chandigarh International Airport
Near reputed schools and Tricity hospitals

about:
Uptown Skylla by Artique Infratech redefines luxury living in the heart of the Tricity. Located directly on PR-7, the 200 ft Airport Road in Zirakpur, this highrise community places residents within easy reach of Chandigarh, Mohali and Panchkula, alongside leading schools, hospitals, malls and the airport.

The development offers a thoughtfully curated mix of 2, 3 and 4 BHK apartments across six layouts, from 1220 to 2505 sq.ft. Homes draw in natural light and courtyard views, with integrated kitchens and ample storage. On-site, Club Skylla adds a pool, air-conditioned gym, indoor games and a party hall.

An IGBC Gold-certified community built on an RCC earthquake-resistant frame vetted from IIT Roorkee, Uptown Skylla pairs premium living with jogging tracks, an amphitheatre, water bodies and fountain gardens — all within a secured, gated society monitored round the clock.

about:
Affinity Belgravia is a 15-acre signature residential address by Affinity Buildtech, rising along NH 7 on the Patiala Highway in Zirakpur. Conceived for a discerning few, the development comprises S+20 storeyed towers offering expansive 3 BHK, 3 BHK with servant room and 4 BHK with servant room residences and penthouses, each crafted with floor-to-ceiling windows, branded flooring and panoramic sun decks that frame the landscaped gardens, city skyline and distant Shivalik Hills.

Built on the modern MIVAN aluminium-formwork system for strength and precision, the project pairs architectural grandeur with everyday convenience. A grand double-height lobby, high-speed premium elevators and a richly amenitised clubhouse, the Versatile Club, anchor a lifestyle that ranges from a swimming pool, air-conditioned gymnasium and indoor games to a banquet hall, amphitheatre and a suite of sports courts. Expansive landscaping with water bodies, jogging tracks, meditation gardens and dedicated zones for children and seniors completes the experience.

Strategically positioned minutes from Aerocity, the International Airport, IT City, Amity University and the region's leading malls, hospitals and schools, Affinity Belgravia also integrates a vibrant commercial plaza with branded retail. It is an address designed for those who have an affinity for quality and an uncompromising attitude towards all things fine.

about:
Green Lotus Utsav is a premium IGBC pre-certified Platinum rated residential development by Maya Estate, on International Airport Road in Zirakpur. Conceived under the belief that life should be celebrated, Utsav brings together spacious 3, 4 and 5 BHK apartments, expansive duplexes and lavish penthouses, alongside retail shops, in a thoughtfully planned green community by Green Lotus — the region's dedicated green project company.

Every home is designed for optimised sunshine, fresh-air circulation and resource efficiency, delivering a projected 20-30% reduction in energy costs and a 30-40% cut in water usage. Sustainability is built in — rain water harvesting, waste water reuse, FSC-certified wood, low-VOC paints, EV charging and energy-efficient systems. Interiors are finished with vitrified flooring, modular kitchens with granite slabs, branded sanitaryware and a comprehensive package of premium appliances.

At the heart of the community is The Green Club — an all-season pool, gym, badminton, squash and tennis courts, billiards and games room, cafe, library and guest rooms. Upper-category homes extend the celebration outdoors with private terraces, deck areas and splash pools. With the airport seven minutes away and seamless Tricity connectivity, Green Lotus Utsav blends green living with everyday convenience.

about:
Escon Primera is a landmark high-rise residential development by Malwa Developers, rising along the International Airport Road in District Mohali at the heart of the Tricity. Conceived to define the skyline of Tricity, it brings together 440+ intricately designed homes across towers reaching 17 or more floors, set within 5 acres of open green and anchored by Escon Culture — The Club. Configurations span 2 and 3 BHK residences (1550 and 2050 sq.ft.) alongside expansive 2450 sq.ft. 3+1 BHK homes, each crafted for efficient, Vastu-compliant living.

What sets it apart is the assurance behind it: Malwa Developers is a single-family firm with a 41-year track record and a debt-free, dispute-free history, and the complete 21-acre land bank is fully registered in the developer's name. Every home is built using MIVAN aluminium-formwork technology, producing a monolithic structure engineered for smoother finishes, greater wall strength and superior resistance to seepage and seismic stress.

Residents enjoy a gymnasium, swimming pool, steam room, banquet hall, cafe and mini-theatre, complemented by basketball, tennis and cricket facilities, a skating rink, golf putting area and children's zones. With four-tier security, biometric and RFID access, EV charging, rainwater harvesting and 880+ parking spaces, Escon Primera is a future-ready address five minutes from the airport.

about:
El Spazia is a ready-to-move residential landmark on PR-7 (Airport Road) in Zirakpur, crafted by Allwin Infrastructure Limited and styled in award-winning Spanish architecture. Designed by qualified civil engineers, the towers stand three-side-open to draw in light and air, while a low-density mix of 3 BHK, 3+1 BHK, duplexes and penthouses keeps the community intimate and serene.

Every home is finished to an exceptional standard and equipped with premium Japanese brands such as Lixil, Toto and Fujitech, with no use of red bricks in construction. The project arrives fully compliant: Occupancy Certificate received, immediate registry, instant electric meter and a piped gas connection, so families can settle in without delay.

Residents enjoy a complete suite of lifestyle amenities, including a swimming pool, gymnasium, club house, indoor and outdoor sports, an activity room, kids play areas and landscaped greens. Just 300 metres from the Chandigarh-Delhi Highway and minutes from the international airport, schools, hospitals and malls, El Spazia pairs a connected address with the calm of an established, gentry neighbourhood where 70+ families already live happily.

about:
Gillco Meraqui is the most exquisite chapter yet in the Gillco Group's 25-year legacy of building landmark homes across the Tricity. Rising along the 200ft-wide Airport Road in Sector 126, Mohali, Meraqui is an exclusive collection of 444 residences across six soaring towers. Its name, drawn from the Greek philosophy of Meraki and the golden ratio of Phi, speaks to a life approached with intention, devotion and timeless beauty.

Conceived by Morphogenesis, one of the world's Top 100 architectural firms, every home is a private world of grandeur. The generously proportioned 3 and 4 BHK residences, each with servant quarters and ranging from 3150 to 4550 sq.ft., are crafted as sanctuaries in proportion, material and detail, with expansive balconies framing the Mohali skyline.

At its heart lies The Meraqui Club, anchored by a rooftop infinity pool, an indoor heated pool, an infrared sauna, a private bowling alley and a world-class dining experience. Landscapes by Oracles, lighting by Lucent Worldwide, interiors by Essajees Atelier and Vastu guidance come together to create an address that defines life at its finest.
locationAdv: Direct frontage on the 200ft Airport Road (PR7)

Close to Fortis & Ivy hospitals and leading schools
Easy access to Chandigarh International Airport
